properties.body: NAVAREA XX 37/26 BARENTS SEA. CHARTS RUS 10100, 10102. 1. ROCKET LAUNCHING 1100 TO 2100 UTC DAILY 19 TO 28 MAR NAVIGATION PROHIBITED IN TERRITORIAL WATERS DANGEROUS OUTSIDE IN AREA BOUNDED BY: A. 70-13.0N 045-43.0E, 70-02.0N 047-12.0E, 68-49.0N 045-50.0E, 69-00.0N 044-27.0E. B. 77-52.0N 061-55.0E, 77-37.0N 063-39.0E, 76-39.0N 060-30.0E, 76-56.0N 058-52.0E. 2. CANCEL THIS MSG 282200 UTC MAR 26.= NNNN
